title: Spicy Sunflower Sprout Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and nutritious Thai-inspired stir fry made with sunflower seeds, sprouts, and delight sauce. Serve as a snack or side dish.
instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium-high heat.
Add 1 tbsp of delight sauce and sauté for 1 minute.
Add sunflower seeds and sprouts, stir-frying for 2-3 minutes.
Add remaining 1 tbsp of delight sauce, stir-frying for another minute.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Store leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
